  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

CRCM453_CRCM_Appl_C2_01.02.05.ddt

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 74B
Recv ID: 76B
Baudrate: 500000
Func Addr: 1C
Func Name: TCU

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "46",
    "supplier": "220",
    "soft": "0004",
    "version": "0000"
  },
  {
    "diagversion": "46",
    "supplier": "220",
    "soft": "0003",
    "version": "000A"
  }
]

Devices

[
  {
    "dtc": 38931,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Power supply of rear folt top has a malfunction"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 38932,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Button \"Roof System Open\" stucks."
  },
  {
    "dtc": 38933,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Button \"Roof System Close\" stucks."
  },
  {
    "dtc": 38934,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Relay of  actuator motor \"RFT left\" has a malfunction"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 38935,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Relay of  actuator motor \"RFT right\" has a malfunction"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 38936,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "The actuator motor \"FFT\" has overtemperature"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 38937,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Relay of actuator motor \"FFT\" has a malfunction"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 38939,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Limit switch \"FFT\" has a malfunction"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 38940,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Limit switch \"RFT Left\" stucks"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 38941,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Limit switch \"RFT Right\" stucks"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 38943,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "The Hall sensor signal is implausible with the limit switch \"FFT\""
  },
  {
    "dtc": 38944,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "The Hall sensor 1 or 2 of the control unit \"Convertible\" has a malfunction"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 38945,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "The convertible roof is not normalized"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 38946,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Maximum runtime of the FFT motor has been exceeded."
  },
  {
    "dtc": 38947,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Maximum runtime of the RFT motor has been exceeded."
  },
  {
    "dtc": 38956,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Unexpected stall/block on motor \"RFT left\""
  },
  {
    "dtc": 38957,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Unexpected stall/block on motor \"RFTright\""
  },
  {
    "dtc": 41582,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Buttons of \"Roof System\" has an implausible signal"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 41636,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Control unit Convertible has undervoltage"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 42297,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "The values from the limit switches \"Soft top\" are implausible relative to each other."
  },
  {
    "dtc": 49424,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Bus off"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 49442,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Communication with the Brake ECU has a malfunction"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 49472,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Communication with the BCM ECU has a malfunction"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 49493,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Communication with the intrument cluster has a malfunction"
  }
]
